languages.original_text: "The gaze of the Undying One does not turn on those who avoid suffering. Nor does He grant revelation to those who fear to shed blood for His sake."

languages.text: "Взгляд Неумирающего не обращается к тем, кто избегает страданий. И не дарит откровение тем, кто боится пролить кровь ради него".
languages.translation_comment: A Rogue Trader proves his honesty to a smart man from the frontier world. A tough game of chess awaits

languages.text: "The gaze of the Undying One does not turn on those who avoid suffering. Nor does He grant revelation to those who fear to shed blood for His sake."
languages.original_text: "Взгляд Неумирающего не обращается к тем, кто избегает страданий. И не дарит откровение тем, кто боится пролить кровь ради него".

"The gaze of the Undying One does not turn on those who avoid suffering. Nor does He grant revelation to those who fear to shed blood for His sake."

languages.text: 「苦しみを避ける者には、不死の者の視線が向けられない。また、彼の為めに血を流すことを恐れる者には、啓示は与えられない」
languages.original_text: "The gaze of the Undying One does not turn on those who avoid suffering. Nor does He grant revelation to those who fear to shed blood for His sake."

traits.locale_text: 「苦しみを避ける者には、不死の者の視線が向けられない。また、彼の為めに血を流すことを恐れる者には、啓示は与えられない。」

languages.text: « L'Immortel ne pose pas son regard sur ceux qui se dérobent à la souffrance. Il n'accorde pas non plus de révélations à ceux qui craignent de verser le sang en Son nom. »
languages.original_text: "The gaze of the Undying One does not turn on those who avoid suffering. Nor does He grant revelation to those who fear to shed blood for His sake."

traits.locale_text: « L'Immortel ne pose pas son regard sur ceux qui se dérobent à la souffrance. Il n'accorde pas non plus de révélations à ceux qui craignent de verser le sang en Son nom. »

languages.text: "Der Todlose wendet seinen Blick nicht jenen zu, die den Schmerz meiden. Und Er gewährt jenen keine Erlösung, die fürchten, in Seinem Namen Blut zu vergießen."
languages.original_text: "The gaze of the Undying One does not turn on those who avoid suffering. Nor does He grant revelation to those who fear to shed blood for His sake."

traits.locale_text: "Der Todlose wendet seinen Blick nicht jenen zu, die den Schmerz meiden. Und Er gewährt jenen keine Erlösung, die fürchten, in Seinem Namen Blut zu vergießen."

languages.text: "Ölmeyen'in, bakışları acıdan kaçanlara çevrilmez. Ne de O'nun uğruna kan dökmekten korkanlara vahiy bahşeder."
languages.original_text: "The gaze of the Undying One does not turn on those who avoid suffering. Nor does He grant revelation to those who fear to shed blood for His sake."

traits.locale_text: "Ölmeyen'in, bakışları acıdan kaçanlara çevrilmez. Ne de O'nun uğruna kan dökmekten korkanlara vahiy bahşeder."

languages.text: «La mirada del Inmortal no se centra en quienes evitan el sufrimiento. Como tampoco otorga Su revelación a quienes temen derramar sangre en Su nombre».
languages.original_text: "The gaze of the Undying One does not turn on those who avoid suffering. Nor does He grant revelation to those who fear to shed blood for His sake."

traits.locale_text: «La mirada del Inmortal no se centra en quienes evitan el sufrimiento. Como tampoco otorga Su revelación a quienes temen derramar sangre en Su nombre».

languages.text: “逃避苦难之人，不配蒙受不死之神的凝视。畏惧为祂流血之人，也不配获得祂的启示。”
languages.original_text: "The gaze of the Undying One does not turn on those who avoid suffering. Nor does He grant revelation to those who fear to shed blood for His sake."

traits.locale_text: “逃避苦难之人，不配蒙受不死之神的凝视。畏惧为祂流血之人，也不配获得祂的启示。”
